_description: Golden Set Manifest — expected outcomes for each real document set. Used to validate that DocsValidate correctly extracts data and detects inconsistencies.
_howToUse: 1) Run each set through the app. 2) Compare extraction results against 'expectedExtractions'. 3) Compare detected issues against 'expectedIssues'. 4) Log results in results/ folder.

sets.description: Minimal set: 3 docs (BL, Phyto, TAC certificate). Baseline simple.
knownLimitations: Only 3 docs — may trigger 'incomplete set' observation
sets.notes: Baseline simple test. If this fails, something fundamental is broken.

sets.description: Complete cacao set: BL, Invoice, Packing List, Phyto, Cert Origen, Cert Calidad, Fumigation, Letter of Declaration, Shipping Notification. LOTE 24-2026.
sets.notes: Canonical clean set. If this shows false positives, investigate noise sources.

sets.description: Mixed format set with ISF Excel. Multi-lot (27,28). 5 docs: BL, Invoice, Letter, Packing List, ISF.xlsx
sets.notes: Tests Excel ISF extraction. Lot numbers span 27-2026 and 28-2026.

sets.description: Complete set with Excel ISF. Same shipment as Set 2 (LOTE 24-2026) but with ISF added. 11 docs.
sets.notes: Superset of Set 2. Should produce same results with ISF data added.

sets.description: Multi-lot (27,28) with 2 separate fumigation certificates. 11 docs including ISF Excel.

knownFalsePositives.description: Each fumigation cert covers only 1 lot (half the shipment). Tool may flag weight mismatch between fumigation certs and full-shipment docs. This is NOT an error — the fumigations are per-lot, not per-shipment.
knownFalsePositives.expectedBehavior: Should NOT flag as error, or flag as observation only

knownFalsePositives.description: Same as weight — fumigation certs show per-lot bag count, not total

sets.notes: CRITICAL TEST: This is the most common real-world pattern — multi-lot shipments with per-lot certificates. If the tool can't handle this correctly, it generates noise that erodes trust.

sets.description: Partial set: only BL, Booking, and ISF. LOTE 31,32. 3 docs.
sets.notes: Tests behavior with minimal docs. Should not crash or produce meaningless results.

sets.description: Set with possible year mismatch: FITO says 05-2025, everything else says 05-2026. 8 docs. Also has both BL and SWB (Sea Waybill).

expectedIssues.description: Phyto cert filename says LOTE 05-2025 while all other docs say LOTE 05-2026. Tool should detect year discrepancy IF the content also differs.
expectedIssues.action: VERIFY: Is this a filename typo or actual content mismatch?

sets.notes: NEEDS MANUAL VERIFICATION: Open the phyto cert and check if content says 2025 or 2026. If filename is just a typo, expected verdict changes to approved.

sets.description: Complete set LOTE 167-2025 with BL + SWB + ISF Excel. 9 docs.
sets.notes: Tests dual transport document (BL + SWB for same shipment).

sets.description: COI organic set (TRADIN). 3 docs: BL, COI organic certificate, phyto-like doc. Different format/origin.
sets.notes: Tests organic certification workflow. COI has complex format with certifier, standard, operator fields.

sets.description: COI + cocoa butter (different product). Has previous DocsValidate reports for comparison. 3 source docs + 3 reports.
sets.notes: Contains 3 previous DocsValidate reports — use to compare consistency across runs. Only upload the 3 source docs (BL, COI, VE doc), not the reports.

sets.path: sets de prueba/Set 11 error no factura 823 vs 824
sets.description: KNOWN ERROR SET: Invoice number mismatch. Everything says 823, Certificate of Origin says 824. LOTE 33,34. Multi-lot with 2 fumigation certs. 12 source docs.

expectedIssues.description: Certificate of Origin references invoice 001-002-000000824 while all other documents reference 001-002-000000823. This is the KNOWN REAL ERROR that must be detected.

knownFalsePositives.description: Cert Origen bag count must be read as 2896, NOT 3896. If tool reports 3896, it is an EXTRACTION ERROR (AI misread).
Fumigation certs show per-lot weight (~99912 kg each) while total shipment is ~199824 kg. This is NOT an error.
knownFalsePositives.expectedBehavior: Should not flag, or flag as observation only

knownFalsePositives.description: Cert Calidad may say 'Marítimo' (transport mode) and Cert Origen may say 'VIA MARITIMA'. These are NOT vessel names — the real vessel is CMA CGM HARMONY.
knownFalsePositives.expectedBehavior: Should not flag transport mode as vessel name mismatch

testsFocusArea: false positive control in multi-lot sets
sets.notes: THE MOST IMPORTANT TEST. This is a real error from production. The tool must: (1) detect the 823 vs 824 invoice mismatch, (2) correctly read 2896 bags (not 3896), (3) not flag per-lot fumigation weights as errors, (4) not confuse transport mode with vessel name.
